Codex channels use an OAuth JSON credent: Codex channels use an OAuth JSON credential as the key. For standard OpenAI API keys and Codex models, use the OpenAI channel.
Each tier supports up to 2 conditions. T: Each tier supports up to 2 conditions. The last tier without conditions is the fallback.
Leave empty to keep the default /v1/* pa: Leave empty to keep the default /v1/* path. You can enter responses, /responses, or any custom upstream path.

Use responses when the upstream keeps th: Use responses when the upstream keeps the base URL suffix (for example /codex) but exposes /responses instead of /v1/responses
